title: Reload BetterVanilla
description: A "Better Vanilla" modpack, having some new strictly simple features, content, and good optimization for all who need it.
body:
simple modpack adding fine optimization, with some rather simple but can-be-significant mods to enhance vanilla gameplay. Also, this adds a little more content not complicated in idea, keeping your survival as simple as it can be.

As I think I should mention, I made it also with the intent of letting others play with this idea of a pack, therefore this pack is also a template for anyone to use.
